channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 500,000 people were confined in state psychiatric hospitals. Their descendants cannot learn why
item.description: Breta Meria Conole spent more than two decades in a state psychiatric hospital. The reason remains a family mystery for her great-granddaughter Debby Hannigan.

item.title: Nonprofit fraud is not surging. Enforcement is
item.description: The $6.8 billion enforcement push from the Department of Justice is revealing cases such as the $250 million missing in Minnesota.

item.title: The more generous U.S. ceasefire terms are, the more suspicious Iran becomes they are a ruse for another attack, expert says
item.description: "The deal in play looks like a win for Iran. But Tehran is not convinced that it is not a dress rehearsal for war now or in 30 days."

item.title: From Hobbes to the 14th Amendment: Historical and Modern Arguments Against Trump's $1.8 Billion Fund
item.description: In ancient Rome, the principle 'Nemo iudex in causa sua' meant no one should judge their own case.
